name: Phosphor Glass
description: Dark navy glass over a real blur that behaves like a phosphor screen. Bright content behind the surface excites a glowing response in the brand gradient, the glow breathes like phosphor persistence, and a slow diagonal sweep recharges the pane as it passes. Where no scene exists behind the surface it falls back to a translucent navy slab with the same shimmer.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the pane corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Navy depth
parameters.description: How far the blurred scene sinks toward the navy surface

parameters.name: Glow strength
parameters.description: Brightness of the excited phosphor response

parameters.name: Excitation threshold
parameters.description: How bright the backdrop must be before the glass glows

parameters.name: Hue flow speed
parameters.description: How fast the gradient hue drifts through the pane

parameters.name: Sweep speed
parameters.description: How fast the recharge sweep travels the pane

parameters.name: Gradient cyan
parameters.description: First stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient blue
parameters.description: Second stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient purple
parameters.description: Third stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Gradient rose
parameters.description: Fourth stop of the brand gradient

parameters.name: Glass tint
parameters.description: The navy surface the blurred scene sinks toward
